title: 9mm Colorful Mud Balls Hard Clay Ball Sling Shot Ball for Shooting Target Practice
features: Diameter: 9.00mm(+/- 1 mm); Color:Colorful ; Light weight, easy to use.
Package Weight:0.3kg,Package Include: pack of 0.3kg balls.
Material: pottery clay, 100% natural mud balls, it is Biodegradable , more Environmentally Friendly.Though it made of clay, the hard surfaces making it more easily to hit the target.

Excellent alternative to plastic practice balls that you don't need to pick up as they biodegrade easily.Note: It needs to be kept dry. If it feels not hard enough, it can be dried in the sun and stored in a sealed container.
More environmentally friendly than plastic practice ball, more convenient, more clearly.
